source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 携手推动人工智能向上向善造福人类

topics.why_hot: AI ethics and governance are global hot topics; China's stance attracts international attention.
topics.share_angle: Explain China's call for responsible AI development and its implications for global tech governance.

topics.share_angle: Highlight key breakthroughs in science and tech from the past week.
